title: Exporting Date from Label Column
excerpt:
I’m trying to export the data I’ve entered into a label column but can’t find a practical way to do so. 
Is there an API or something I can use to pull this information? Its a pretty extensive list we’ve added over time. …

posts.author: ChrisRad (Chris Rad)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to export the data I’ve entered into a label column but can’t find a practical way to do so.

Is there an API or something I can use to pull this information? Its a pretty extensive list we’ve added over time.

posts.author: JMW_Carla (Carla Timmins)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello I have a similar request: I want to see a full list the labels created in a droplist column. I want cross check this list correlates with my latest product list or vice versa.
